_notes: Source of truth for the reading atlas (About page section) AND the AI layer (content-index atlas block).
Each post stores only its logical page path + a one-line hook; titles/reading times resolve at build time via site.GetPage in layouts/shortcodes/start-here.html.
Converted from YAML to JSON so scripts/generate-content-index.mjs can read it with zero deps; Hugo site.Data reads JSON identically.

Paths follow the v3 content architecture (2026-07): ai-agent and engineering are separate sections; project deep-dives (markitdown/langgraph/notebooklm) live in the AI Agent path since that is their section.
Curation basis (GSC 2026-07): my-hugo is the CTR champion; markitdown/langgraph/notebooklm are the top organic pages.

zh.heading: 从这里开始
zh.intro: 认识了我这个人，接下来认识我的写作。这个博客围绕四条主线：AI Agent、工程与开源、成长与思考、旅行与观察。不知道从哪读起？下面是为第一次来的你画的地图。

first_read.label: 只想先读一篇？
first_read.hook: 一年的深度复盘——技术、成长、旅行都在里面。读完这一篇，你就大致认识我了。

zh.paths_note: 四条主线，各选了几篇代表作。挑一条感兴趣的走进去。

paths.title: AI Agent
paths.audience: 写给对 LLM 应用、智能体工程与开源 AI 项目源码感兴趣的开发者——这是全站搜索流量最高的一条线。
paths.more_label: 浏览全部 AI Agent 文章

posts.hook: 微软 MarkItDown 源码深读——本站被搜索最多的一页。
LangGraph 设计、架构与原理的深度解析。
Google NotebookLM 背后的 RAG 工程调研。
从洛克的人格同一性谈到 AI 智能体的身份——一篇署名之作。
给 AI 装上记忆：mem0 架构与原理拆解。

paths.title: 工程与开源
paths.audience: 写给关心 Kubernetes 云原生、Go 工程与开源实践的工程师。

posts.hook: 这个博客是怎么搭起来的：Hugo 建站的完整实践。
零基础快速理解 Kubernetes 的长青入门篇。
Go 发布工具链与工程实践，从头到尾。
在开源社区高效提问的艺术——参与开源的第一课。

paths.title: 成长与思考
paths.audience: 写给正在自我探索、年度复盘、认知升级路上的你。
paths.more_label: 浏览全部成长与思考文章

posts.hook: 当 AI 什么都会，「我」的重量在哪里？
如何进入并保持心流——一份完整指南。
元认知转变的亲历复盘：怎样觉察自己的思考。
GTD 与四象限的落地实践，真正跑得通的生产力系统。
超级个体：一个人 + AI 能走多远。

paths.title: 旅行与观察
paths.audience: 写给数字游民、徒步爱好者和文化观察者。

posts.hook: 跨越 9 个国家的互动足迹地图——从这里俯瞰全部旅程。
在世界边缘流浪的一年——数字游民生活实录。
富士山登顶与日本行记。
拉萨：慢与重——高原上的观察手记。

subscribe.text: 新文章不定期发布——用 RSS 或邮件跟上更新，不错过下一篇。

explore.title: 换个方式认识我
explore.note: 下面是一张可拖拽的 3D 知识星系：中心是我本人，环绕的是我的身份与专注的领域。拖动旋转，点击任意节点即可深入。

colophon.label: 关于本站
colophon.entity: cubxxw.com 是熊鑫伟（Xinwei Xiong，网名 cubxxw）的个人博客。他生于 2001 年，是一名 AI 创业者、开源贡献者与数字游民，活跃于 OpenIM、OpenKF、Sealos 等开源项目。博客写作围绕四条主线：AI Agent（LLM 应用、智能体工程、GEO，以及 MarkItDown、LangGraph、NotebookLM 等开源项目的源码深读）、工程与开源（Kubernetes、Go、DevOps 与开源实践）、成长与思考（年度复盘、元认知、心流），以及旅行与观察（9 个国家、35+ 城市、400+ 公里徒步）。

facts.v: AI 创业者 · 开源贡献者 · 数字游民
AI Agent / 工程与开源 / 成长与思考 / 旅行与观察
9 个国家 · 35+ 城市 · 徒步 400+ 公里

en.heading: Start Here
en.intro: Now that you know the person, meet the writing. Everything on this blog follows four threads: AI agents, engineering & open source, growth & thinking, and travel & observation. Not sure where to begin? Here is the map drawn for your first visit.

first_read.label: Just want one post?
first_read.hook: A year in deep review — the tech, the growth, the travel, all in one place. Read this and you will roughly know me.

en.paths_note: Four threads, a few representative posts each. Pick the one that pulls you in.

paths.title: AI Agent
paths.audience: For developers curious about LLM applications, agent engineering, and open-source AI deep-dives — the highest-traffic thread on this site.

posts.hook: A deep read of Microsoft's MarkItDown — the most-searched page on this site.
LangGraph's design, architecture, and principles, dissected.
The RAG engineering behind Google NotebookLM.
From Locke's personal identity to the identity of AI agents — a signature essay.
Giving AI a memory: the mem0 architecture, unpacked.

paths.title: Engineering & Open Source
paths.audience: For engineers who care about Kubernetes, cloud native, Go, and open-source practice.

posts.hook: How this blog is built: a complete Hugo walkthrough.
The evergreen zero-to-one introduction to Kubernetes.
Go release tooling and engineering practice, end to end.
The art of asking good questions — lesson one of open source.

paths.title: Growth & Thinking
paths.audience: For anyone on the road of self-discovery, annual reviews, and sharper thinking.

posts.hook: When AI can do everything, where does the weight of the self sit?
How to enter and hold a flow state — a complete guide.
A first-person review of a metacognitive shift.
GTD and the four-quadrant rule, as a system that actually runs.
The super individual: how far can one person plus AI go?

paths.title: Travel & Observation
paths.audience: For digital nomads, hikers, and cultural observers.

posts.hook: An interactive footprint map across 9 countries — the whole journey at a glance.
A year of wandering at the edge of the world — digital nomad life, unfiltered.
Summiting Mount Fuji, and the rest of Japan.
Lhasa: slow and heavy — field notes from the plateau.

subscribe.text: New posts ship irregularly — follow along via RSS or email so you don't miss the next one.

explore.title: Meet me another way
explore.note: Below is a draggable 3D knowledge galaxy: the core is me, orbited by my identities and the fields I focus on. Drag to rotate, click any node to dive in.

colophon.label: About this site
colophon.entity: cubxxw.com is the personal blog of Xinwei Xiong (known online as cubxxw). Born in 2001, he is an AI founder, open-source contributor, and digital nomad, active in projects such as OpenIM, OpenKF, and Sealos. The blog follows four threads: AI agents (LLM applications, agent engineering, GEO, and source-level deep dives into MarkItDown, LangGraph, NotebookLM, and more), engineering & open source (Kubernetes, Go, DevOps), growth & thinking (annual reviews, metacognition, flow), and travel & observation (9 countries, 35+ cities, 400+ km on foot).

facts.v: AI founder · Open-source contributor · Digital nomad
AI Agent / Engineering & Open Source / Growth & Thinking / Travel
